cards.name: P1: BITKRAFT Ventures - Carlos Pereira
cards.desc:
**Fund:** BITKRAFT Ventures
**Partner:** Carlos Pereira (GP, Crypto & Gaming)
**Email:** carlos@bitkraft.vc
**Fit Score:** 94/100

**Fit Breakdown:**
- Gaming Native Fund: 20/20
- AI Infrastructure Focus: 20/20
- Fresh Capital 2024: 18/20
- Esports Gaming DNA: 18/20
- Check Size Alignment: 18/20

**Check Size:** $500K - $5M
**Stage:** Seed to Series B
**Recent Fund:** BITKRAFT Venture Fund 3 - $275M (June 2025)

**Key Investments:**
- Immutable X (Layer 2 gaming blockchain)
- Magic Eden (NFT marketplace, unicorn)
- Higgsfield (AI video, unicorn)
- Liminal Experiences (AI-powered gaming)
- GameRamp (AI-native publishing OS)
- Appcharge ($58M Series B, 2025)

**Outreach Angle:**
BITKRAFT's newly raised $275M Fund 3 (June 2025) is actively deploying in AI-gaming intersections. Their 'Agents of Change' thesis on AI in gaming explicitly targets autonomous agents and procedural world generation. Carlos leads crypto and gaming investments at the intersection of AI and interactive media.

**Thesis Match:**
BITKRAFT is the global early-stage investment platform exclusively focused on gaming, Web3, AI, and immersive media. Founded by esports pioneer Jens Hilgers, they've backed 135+ companies and invest heavily in AI-powered gaming infrastructure, AI-generated content for games, and synthetic reality technologies.

**Email Draft:** See P1_BITKRAFT_CarlosPereira.txt

**Status:** Ready to send

**Outreach Angle:**

Nat's GitHub background means appreciation for developer tools and infrastructure plays. The grant-first approach de-risks early-stage AI gaming experiments.

**Thesis Match:**
AI Grant provides $250K grants plus $250K-$600K in Azure/compute credits on maximally founder-friendly terms (no-cap, no-discount MFN SAFE). Their thesis centers on fundamental AI research applied to real-world problems, including AI agents, generative content, and synthetic environments.
